Middle East.detail: On October 7, Hamas-led gunmen killed ~1,200 Israelis and took 250 hostages in the deadliest single-day attack on Jewish people since the Holocaust, triggering Israel's declaration of war.

Middle East.event: Israel Launches Ground Invasion of Gaza
Middle East.detail: On October 27, Israeli ground forces pushed into Gaza to dismantle Hamas and recover hostages, beginning a campaign that displaced nearly the entire Gazan population.
The day after October 7, Hezbollah began firing rockets at northern Israel, forcing evacuations and opening a two-front war.
Israel detonated booby-trapped pagers, killed Nasrallah in a Beirut airstrike, then invaded southern Lebanon on October 1.
A US-brokered ceasefire paused the war and began hostage exchanges, but talks for a permanent end collapsed within weeks.

Middle East.event: The 12-Day War: US Bombs Iran's Nuclear Sites
Middle East.detail: Israel struck Iran June 13; the US joined June 22, hitting Fordow, Natanz, Isfahan — the largest B-2 strike in history — before a Qatar-brokered ceasefire on June 24.

Middle East.event: Iran Refuses Diplomacy, Crackdown Kills Thousands
Middle East.detail: Three rounds of nuclear talks collapsed. Iran enriched uranium and killed over 36,000 protesters.

Middle East.event: Operation Epic Fury — U.S. & Israel Strike Iran
Middle East.detail: Massive joint campaign. Khamenei killed. 48+ senior officials killed. IRGC vows retaliation. Iran fires missiles at 12 countries.

Middle East.event: Hezbollah Enters the War — Lebanon Front Opens
Middle East.detail: Hezbollah launched rockets at Israel for Khamenei's killing. Israel struck Beirut. Lebanese PM demanded Hezbollah disarm. Iran attacked Gulf states.

Middle East.event: Day 3: 6 U.S. Troops Killed; Iran Death Toll Rises
Middle East.detail: Six US troops killed. Iran death toll passes 555. 3 US jets downed by Kuwaiti friendly fire (crew safe). Trump says 4-5 weeks. 300,000+ stranded.

Middle East.event: Day 5: IRGC 230 Drones; Gulf Energy Hit; Hormuz Closed
Middle East.detail: IRGC launched 230 drones at US bases. QatarEnergy suspended LNG. Ras Tanura refinery hit. Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. Israel seized ground in South Lebanon.

Middle East.event: Day 7: 1,230 Dead; House Backs War; Lebanon Invasion Imminent
Middle East.detail: Iran death toll reaches 1,230. Trump says navy, air force, air defense 'gone.' 24 ships sunk. House votes to continue Epic Fury. 168 killed in girls' school attack. Israel orders 800,000 to evacuate southern Lebanon. NATO activates missile defense. Hegseth: munitions 'full up.' GCC invokes Article 51.

Eastern Europe.detail: Putin launched a full-scale invasion expecting swift collapse — Ukrainian forces repelled the northern thrust within six weeks.
Counteroffensives liberated thousands of square kilometers in the war's most dramatic swings.

Eastern Europe.event: Russia Takes Bakhmut After Months of Slaughter
Eastern Europe.detail: The longest, bloodiest battle — signaling attrition would define the conflict.
Western-backed offensive made minimal gains against fortified Russian lines.
Ukraine seized ~1,000 sq km of Russian territory — first foreign occupation of Russian soil since WWII.

Eastern Europe.event: North Korean Troops Join Russia's War
Eastern Europe.detail: ~11,000 North Korean soldiers deployed alongside Russian forces.

Eastern Europe.event: Trump Pushes for Ceasefire; Trilateral Talks in UAE
Eastern Europe.detail: First trilateral talks since the invasion. Territory remains the central sticking point.

Eastern Europe.event: Third Round of Geneva Trilateral Talks
Eastern Europe.detail: Focused on territory, security guarantees, and an economic package. US proposed a free economic zone in Donbas.

Eastern Europe.event: Ukraine Hits Russian Naval Base; Strikes Oil 750 Miles Deep
Eastern Europe.detail: Ukraine damaged a Russian frigate at a naval base. Struck Saratov oil infrastructure 750+ miles from border. Downed 136 of 155 drones in one night. Russia couldn't advance on any axis March 5. Hungary-Ukraine dispute over Druzhba pipeline flares.

Indo-Pacific.event: Pelosi Visits Taiwan; China Encircles the Island
Indo-Pacific.detail: Pelosi's visit triggered China's largest military exercises in decades, including missiles fired over Taiwan.

Indo-Pacific.event: Chinese Spy Balloon Over the US
Indo-Pacific.detail: A surveillance balloon traversed America before being shot down, exposing a global Chinese balloon intelligence program.

Indo-Pacific.event: China Holds Punitive Drills After Each US-Taiwan Contact
Indo-Pacific.detail: Beijing normalized using military exercises as diplomatic punishment after each US-Taiwan interaction.
Beijing viewed Lai as a dangerous separatist. China responded with surveillance balloons and daily military incursions.
Joint Sword 2024A and 2024B deployed record warships and aircraft simulating a blockade.

Indo-Pacific.event: China's Largest-Ever Taiwan Drills After US Arms Sale
Indo-Pacific.detail: 'Justice Mission 2025' simulated seizure of Taiwan — 89 aircraft and 28 warships in a single day.

Indo-Pacific.event: North Korea's Party Congress: More Nukes, New Goals
Indo-Pacific.detail: Kim pledged to expand nuclear arsenal, develop AI-enabled submarine missiles. Daughter Kim Ju Ae in succession spotlight.

Indo-Pacific.event: China NPC: GDP 4.5-5%, Defense $277B; Kim Tests Destroyer
Indo-Pacific.detail: NPC set lowest GDP target in years (4.5-5%). Defense spending up 7% to $277B. 15th Five-Year Plan launched — AI, chips, energy security prioritized. Kim Jong Un watched cruise missiles launch from new destroyer Choe Hyon. Xi-Trump summit March 31.

Africa & Americas.event: Sudan's Army and Paramilitaries Turn on Each Other
Africa & Americas.detail: SAF and RSF erupted in civil war after a power struggle over military integration collapsed.
RSF swept through Darfur with UN investigators documenting mass killings on a genocidal scale.

Africa & Americas.event: Haiti's Gangs Unite Into One Deadly Coalition
Africa & Americas.detail: Viv Ansanm formed — gangs turned combined firepower on the government, seizing 80% of Port-au-Prince.

Africa & Americas.event: M23 Rebels Capture Goma, DRC's Eastern Hub
Africa & Americas.detail: Rwanda-backed M23 took Goma — the largest gain in a conflict displacing 7M+ people.
US-mediated deals signed but M23 continued advancing through December.

Africa & Americas.event: RSF Captures El Fasher; Sudan Near Partition
Africa & Americas.detail: RSF seized El Fasher — Yale confirmed mass killings. SAF retook Khartoum palace. De facto partition hardening.

Africa & Americas.event: US Delta Force Captures Maduro in Venezuela
Africa & Americas.detail: Operation Absolute Resolve captured Maduro in Caracas. Flown to New York for narco-terrorism charges.
Amnesty law enacted. 3,200+ released officially. Foro Penal independently verifies only 91-109 political releases. 600 still imprisoned.

Africa & Americas.event: Sudan: 'Genocidal Path'; Haiti Opens Electoral Inscriptions
Africa & Americas.detail: UN Fact-Finding Mission described RSF atrocities as 'indicators of a genocidal path.' 1,000 days of war. Up to 400,000 killed. Chad lost 7 soldiers to RSF. Haiti opened electoral inscriptions March 2-12 for planned August elections.
